rewritten_requirements: The system shall transition from the Idle state to the Waiting for PIN state upon arrival of the Card Inserted event.
The system shall wait for customer input of the PIN in the Waiting for PIN state.
The system shall transition from the Waiting for PIN state to the Validating PIN state upon arrival of the PIN Entered event.
The system shall determine whether the customer-entered PIN matches the stored PIN for this card in the Validating PIN state.
The system shall make the Valid PIN transition to the Waiting for Customer Choice state if the customer-entered PIN matches the stored PIN.
The system shall make the Invalid PIN transition to re-enter the Waiting for PIN state and prompt the customer to enter a different PIN number if the PIN numbers do not match.
The system shall make the Third Invalid PIN transition to the Confiscating state if the customer-entered PIN is invalid after three attempts.
The system shall transition to the Confiscating state if the ATM card is reported lost or stolen during card validation.

The system shall transition to the Ejecting state and eject the ATM card if the customer decides to enter Cancel in any of the three states Waiting for PIN, Validating PIN, or Waiting for Customer Choice.
The system shall ignore the PIN Entered event if it arrives in the Idle state.
The system shall allow the customer to select withdrawal from the Waiting for Customer Choice state after successful PIN validation.
The system shall enter the Processing Withdrawal state upon arrival of the Withdrawal Selected event if the customer selects withdrawal.
The system shall transition to the Dispensing state and dispense cash if the withdrawal is approved.
The system shall transition to the Printing state, print the receipt, and arrive upon arrival of the Cash Dispensed event.
The system shall enter the Ejecting state if the receipt is printed and the card has been ejected.
The system shall transition to the Terminating state upon arrival of the Card Ejected event.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The ATM transitions from Idle state to Waiting for PIN state when the Card Inserted event arrives.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the Card Inserted event arrives, the ATM statechart transitions from the Idle state to the Waiting for PIN state...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The ATM waits for customer input of PIN in the Waiting for PIN state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...during which time the ATM is waiting for the customer to input the PIN.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The ATM transitions from Waiting for PIN state to Validating PIN state when the PIN Entered event arrives.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the PIN Entered event arrives, the ATM transitions to the Validating PIN state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The bank system determines whether the customer-entered PIN matches the stored PIN for this card in the Validating PIN state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: In this state the bank system determines whether the customer-entered PIN matches the stored PIN for this card...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the two PIN numbers match, the ATM makes the Valid PIN transition to Waiting for Customer Choice state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...the ATM makes the Valid PIN transition to the Waiting for Customer Choice state.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the PIN numbers do not match, the ATM makes the Invalid PIN transition to re-enter the Waiting for PIN state and prompts the customer to enter a different PIN number.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...the ATM makes the Invalid PIN transition to re-enter the Waiting for PIN state and prompts the customer to enter a different PIN number.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the customer-entered PIN is invalid after the third attempt, the ATM makes the Third Invalid PIN transition to Confiscating state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...if the customer-entered PIN is invalid after the third attempt, the ATM makes the Third Invalid PIN transition to the Confiscating state...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The ATM transitions to Confiscating state if the ATM card is reported lost or stolen during card validation.
If the customer decides to enter Cancel in any of the three states Waiting for PIN, Validating PIN, or Waiting for Customer Choice, the statechart enters Ejecting state and the ATM card is ejected.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...the customer may decide to enter Cancel in any of the three states Waiting for PIN, Validating PIN, or Waiting for Customer Choice...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the PIN Entered event arrives in Idle state, it is ignored.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...if the PIN Entered event arrives in Idle state, it is ignored.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After successful PIN validation, the customer can select withdrawal from Waiting for Customer Choice state.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Next consider the case in which, after successful PIN validation, the customer decides to withdraw cash from the ATM...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Processing Withdrawal state is entered when the customer selects withdrawal and the Withdrawal Selected event arrives.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...the customer makes a selection – for example, the customer selects withdrawal. The statechart then receives a Withdrawal Selected event...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the withdrawal is approved, the statechart goes into Dispensing state where cash is dispensed.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...if the withdrawal is approved, the statechart goes into the Dispensing state, where the cash is dispensed.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The ATM transitions to Printing state when the Cash Dispensed event arrives and prints the receipt.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...When the Cash Dispensed event arrives, the ATM transitions to the Printing state to print the receipt.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Ejecting state is entered when the receipt is printed and the card has been ejected.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...When the receipt is printed, the Ejecting state is entered. When the card has been ejected...

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Terminating state is entered when the Card Ejected event arrives.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: ...as indicated by the Card Ejected event, the Terminating state is entered.
